name: ai_marketing_skills
description: A collection of open-source AI-driven marketing skills focused on enabling growth experiments, managing sales pipelines, optimizing content operations, executing outbound marketing, enhancing SEO, and automating finance-related marketing tasks.

inputs.name: marketing_data
inputs.description: Raw or processed marketing data including customer information, campaign metrics, content details, finance reports, and sales data to be used for experiments and automation.

inputs.name: experiment_parameters
inputs.description: Configuration parameters and hypotheses for growth experiments or marketing strategies.

inputs.name: content_inputs
inputs.description: Text or keywords for content creation, optimization, or SEO enhancement.

inputs.name: outbound_targets
inputs.description: List of outbound marketing targets such as email addresses or contact profiles.

inputs.name: sales_pipeline_data
inputs.description: Information about sales stages, leads, and opportunities to manage and optimize the sales pipeline.

inputs.name: finance_data
inputs.description: Financial information related to marketing budgets, ROI, and automation tasks.

outputs.name: experiment_results
outputs.description: Results and insights from growth experiments and marketing tactic evaluations.

outputs.name: optimized_content
outputs.description: Generated or improved marketing content ready for deployment.

outputs.name: seo_recommendations
outputs.description: Suggestions to enhance search engine optimization for target websites or content.

outputs.name: outbound_campaigns
outputs.description: Prepared outbound marketing communications and engagement plans.

outputs.name: sales_insights
outputs.description: Analytics and insights for effective sales pipeline management.

outputs.name: automation_actions
outputs.description: Records or confirmations of automated finance or marketing operations.

patterns: AI-driven A/B and multivariate growth experiments
Automated sales pipeline tracking and lead scoring
Content generation and optimization with NLP techniques
Outbound marketing automation and personalized messaging
Finance automation for marketing budget and ROI management
steps: Collect and preprocess marketing, sales, content, and finance data inputs
Configure experiment parameters or campaign strategies
Execute AI-powered experiments or run automations for content, sales, SEO, outbound, or finance tasks
Analyze outputs and generate reports or actionable recommendations
Deploy optimized marketing content and campaigns
Continuously monitor and update based on experiment results and automation feedback
use_cases: Running growth experiments to validate marketing hypotheses and improve ROI
Automating sales pipeline management to increase efficiency and track leads
Generating SEO-friendly content to boost organic traffic
Executing outbound marketing campaigns with personalized AI-driven messaging
Automating finance-related marketing processes including budget tracking and ROI analysis

prompt_templates.name: growth_experiment_setup
prompt_templates.template: Design a growth experiment for {campaign_name} targeting {audience} with goals {goals_list}.

prompt_templates.name: seo_optimization_prompt
prompt_templates.template: Suggest SEO improvements for the content related to {topic} focusing on keywords {keywords}.

prompt_templates.name: outbound_message_generator
prompt_templates.template: Create a personalized outbound email message for {contact_name} from {company_name} about {product_or_service}.

prompt_templates.name: sales_pipeline_update
prompt_templates.template: Update the sales pipeline status for lead {lead_name} with current stage {stage} and next steps {next_steps}.

prompt_templates.name: finance_automation_task
prompt_templates.template: Automate the marketing finance process for budget {budget_amount} and track ROI from campaigns {campaign_list}.
